title: Deterministic Tests, Fault Injection, Contract Evidence, and Observability · Browser and Node Client Systems
description: A cross-runtime SDK needs deterministic fetch fakes, local integration tests, abort and truncation faults, contract fixtures, and Web Performance telemetry. Learners cumulatively produce a TypeScript 7 standards-based Fetch fault-injected client verification harness through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Test request construction and response handling with an injected deterministic transport and sanitized fixtures. Demonstrate the result through TypeScript 7 strict types plus WHATWG Fetch Request, Response, Headers, URL, streams, and AbortSignal contracts.

Use a local test server for protocol integration while controlling redirects, delays, truncation, TLS, and cleanup. Demonstrate the result through TypeScript 7 strict types plus WHATWG Fetch Request, Response, Headers, URL, streams, and AbortSignal contracts.

Verify documented provider and consumer contracts against changed schemas, status codes, and version boundaries. Demonstrate the result through TypeScript 7 strict types plus WHATWG Fetch Request, Response, Headers, URL, streams, and AbortSignal contracts.
